title: claytonia oblongifolia
intro: Claytonia oblongifolia, also known as the broadleaf miner's lettuce or winter purslane, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Portulacaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's leaves, stems, and roots have been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, offering benefits like reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Claytonia oblongifolia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or salve, making it a versatile herb for herbalists and natural health practitioners.
